product_name_english: Mini Jute and Fabric Tote Bag
detailed_visual_description: This is a compact, rectangular tote bag featuring a natural, two-tone design. The main body of the bag is crafted from an off-white, finely woven fabric, likely cotton or a similar blend, providing a smooth texture. It is framed and accented with natural light brown jute, which also forms the sturdy, rounded handles. The craftsmanship appears neat with well-defined edges, suggesting a durable and simple construction ideal for everyday use.
